step_rationale: Metabolic/regenerative protein; elevated in AMI but mechanism unclear, likely associated with recovery pathways.
mechanism: REG1A is an acute-phase regenerative protein elevated in acute myocardial infarction, possibly supporting tissue recovery.

references.title: Identification of Cardiometabolic Protein Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction Using Olink Proteomics.
